zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Laurence Hamerton於1380年出生在英國越可爾維格萊斯沃斯時，他的父親Lord Richard De Hamerton Of Hellifield Peel25歲，母親Elizabeth Radcliffe51歲。他於1400年與Isabel Tempest在英國越可爾布拉可維爾結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和7個女兒的父母。他去世於1449年6月27日在英國越可爾朗 普雷斯頓享年69歲，埋葬在英國越可爾朗 普雷斯頓。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Laurence Hamerton于1380年出生在英国越可爾維格萊斯沃斯时，他的父亲Lord Richard De Hamerton Of Hellifield Peel25岁，母亲Elizabeth Radcliffe51岁。他于1400年与Isabel Tempest在英国越可爾布拉可維爾结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和7个女儿的父母。他去世于1449年6月27日在英国越可爾朗 普雷斯頓享年69岁，埋葬在英国越可爾朗 普雷斯頓。

nameMeanings.name: Hamerton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Hammerton
meanings: English: habitational name, usually from Hammerton Green (Yorkshire) and occasionally perhaps from Hamerton (Huntingdonshire), each of which probably derives from Old English hamor, denoting some sort of plant such as hammer-wort, + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’.

nameMeanings.name: Laurence
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From a French form of Latin Laurentius ‘man from Laurentum’. Laurentum was a town in Latium, which may have got its name from Latin laurus ‘laurel’, although it is more probably of pre-Roman origin. The given name was moderately popular in the Middle Ages (when it was used for girls as well as boys), under the influence of a 3rd-century saint who was one of the seven deacons of Rome. He was martyred in 258 . The legend is that, having been required to hand over the Church's treasures to the civil authorities, he assembled the poor and sick and presented them. For this act of Christian defiance, he was roasted to death on a gridiron. In England the name is also associated with St Laurence of Canterbury ( d. 619 ). A more recent influence has been the actor Sir Laurence Olivier ( 1907–89 ). See also Lawrence .

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Laurence Hamerton was born in 1380, in Wigglesworth, Yorkshire, England, his father, Lord Richard De Hamerton Of Hellifield Peel, was 25 and his mother, Elizabeth Radcliffe, was 51. He married Isabel Tempest in 1400, in Bracewell, Yorkshire, England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 7 daughters. He died on 27 June 1449, in Long Preston, Yorkshire, England, at the age of 69, and was buried in Long Preston, Yorkshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Laurence Hamerton est né en 1380, à Wigglesworth, Everwyck, Angleterre, son père, Lord Richard De Hamerton Of Hellifield Peel, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Radcliffe, avait 51 ans. Il a épousé Isabel Tempest en 1400, à Bracewell, Everwyck, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 7 filles. Il est décédé le 27 juin 1449, à Long Preston, Everwyck, Angleterre, à l’âge de 69 ans, et a été enterré à Long Preston, Everwyck, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Laurence Hamerton 1380 in Wigglesworth, Yorkshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Lord Richard De Hamerton Of Hellifield Peel 25 und seine Mutter Elizabeth Radcliffe 51. Er hat 1400 in Bracewell, Yorkshire, England Isabel Tempest geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 7 Töchter. Er starb am 27. Juni 1449 im Alter von 69 Jahren in Long Preston, Yorkshire, England und wurde in Long Preston, Yorkshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Laurence Hamerton è nato il nel 1380 nel Wigglesworth, Yorkshire, England, il suo padre, Lord Richard De Hamerton Of Hellifield Peel, aveva 25 anni e il suo madre, Elizabeth Radcliffe, aveva 51 anni. Lui sposato Isabel Tempest nel 1400, nel Bracewell, Yorkshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 7 figlie. Morì il 27 giugno 1449, nel Long Preston, Yorkshire, England, all'età di 69 anni, e fu sepolto a Long Preston, Yorkshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Laurence Hamertonが1380年にイギリスヨークシュアイアウィググレスウオルスで生まれた時，父Lord Richard De Hamerton Of Hellifield Peelは25歳，母Elizabeth Radcliffeは51歳であった。1400年にイギリスヨークシュアイアブレイセウエルでIsabel Tempestと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と7人の娘の親であった。彼は1449年6月27日にイギリスヨークシュアイアロング プレストンで69歳で死去し，イギリスヨークシュアイアロング プレストンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Laurence Hamerton(이)가 1380년 영국 요르크실르 위글레스워스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Lord Richard De Hamerton Of Hellifield Peel(은)는 25세였고, 그의 어머니 Elizabeth Radcliffe(은)는 51세였다. 그는 1400년 영국 요르크실르 브라스웰에서 Isabel Tempest(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 일곱 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1449년 6월 27일 영국 요르크실르 론그 프레스턴에서 69세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 요르크실르 론그 프레스턴에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Laurence Hamerton nasceu em 1380, em Wigglesworth, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Lord Richard De Hamerton Of Hellifield Peel, tinha 25 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth Radcliffe, tinha 51 anos. Ele casou-se com Isabel Tempest em 1400, em Bracewell, Yorkshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 7 filhas. Ele faleceu em 27 de junho de 1449, em Long Preston, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, com 69 anos, e foi sepultado em Long Preston, Yorkshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Laurence Hamerton родился в 1380 г. в местности виглесворт, еркшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Lord Richard De Hamerton Of Hellifield Peel было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Radcliffe, 51. Он женился на женщине по имени Isabel Tempest в 1400 г. в местности бреисюелл, еркшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 7 дочерей. Он умер 27 июня 1449 г. в местности лонг престон, еркшир, Англия в возрасте 69 лет и был похоронен в местности лонг престон, еркшир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Laurence Hamerton nació en 1380, en Wigglesworth, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Lord Richard De Hamerton Of Hellifield Peel, tenía 25 años y su mamá, Elizabeth Radcliffe, tenía 51 años. Se casó con Isabel Tempest en 1400, en Bracewell, Yorkshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 7 hijas. Murió el 27 de junio de 1449, en Long Preston, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 69 años, y fue sepultado en Long Preston, Yorkshire, Inglaterra.
